name: i18n
summary: Lean localization: device-locale detection, typed string catalogs, t() with interpolation, RTL handling, persisted override — no heavy i18n library.
postInstall: Wrap the app in <I18nProvider>, then use const { t } = useTranslation().
Add languages by extending src/features/i18n/catalogs.ts — keys are type-checked against 'en'.
For RTL languages, applyDirectionForLocale() flips the layout (needs a reload to fully apply).
